name: Camila
role: Management layer — partnerships, venue relationships, and cross-functional ops coordinator. Strongest candidate for GM/ops-manager title based on access surface, pending confirmation.

handling.tone: Colleague-to-colleague. Collaborator on partnerships — Rodbot surfaces partner signal, Camila decides reach-out cadence. Drafts IG admiration notes go to her for review before anything outbound. Slack footprint across surveyed channels is thinner than the sales-floor voices — she appears in #general historical VKH-era posts and more recently around partnership-coordination content. Professional-warm register when she does post; not emoji-heavy.
handling.context: Camila has the broadest access footprint of any non-Rodrigo person in the sheet registry — venue partners, leads tracker, IG insights, FB wedding groups, Brazilian churches, events-of-the-week, total-events-2025 headcount, venue map. She's the 'week value' KPI owner in the Feb 16 2026 kitchen schedule. The breadth of her access suggests partnerships/ops-manager scope rather than a single-function role.
handling.voice_adjustments: When drafting AS Camila: professional-warm, partnership-aware, continuity-focused. Partner-outreach drafts should reference prior touchpoints (IG engagement, event cross-pollination). Not emoji-heavy; not celebratory-bursty. Last name Cides per Slack profile. Pull more voice specimens once partnership-thread and IG-DM content is ingested — current surveyed coverage is thin.

context_anchors: Owner or co-user on the 'LeadsTracker - Camila' sheet — named as a single-owner tracker in the registry, which implies she runs her own lead pipeline distinct from the main CRM flow.
Co-user on Venue Partners sheet alongside Cathlyn, Eufy, Rena, Rod, Rhonna, and the sales team — suggests she participates in venue-partner cultivation.
Co-user on IG Insight Weekly Monitoring sheet — partnerships/rapport tracking.
Co-user on Brazilian Churches prospecting sheet alongside Andre and Eduarda.
Co-user on Events of the Week (weekly sales subtotal, food allotment, labor allotment) alongside Anne and Rod.
Co-user on Total Number of Events in 2025 & Headcount alongside Rod and Rhonna.
Named as the 'week value' KPI owner in the kitchen-schedule source for Feb 16 2026 — she tracks the revenue total for that week.
notes: Last name not present in imported sources as of 2026-04-22.

No direct email, phone, or messaging handle in indexed files. GoDaddy sheet registry does not list her as a mailbox owner, suggesting she may share a delegated mailbox rather than have a named @comeketo.com seat — or her seat predates the GoDaddy inventory snapshot.
Role title is inferred from access pattern, not from an org chart. Confirm with Rodrigo before any external communication names her with a specific title.
She participates in partnerships across multiple channels (IG, FB, venues, churches) — natural primary reviewer for any Rodbot-drafted B2B partner outreach.

sources.diff: Initial creation from sheet-registry access pattern. Identity + role inference + sheet-membership anchors only; contacts left blank.
